assertion_results.text: After creating the upstream backport task, the skill re-fetches the task description from Jira and computes a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 79-95 (Task 1 Description Digest Comment Procedure): Step 1 re-fetches via 'jira.get_issue("TC-9001", fields=["description"])'; Step 3 computes digest via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md'. The re-fetch and digest computation are explicitly documented for the upstream backport task.

assertion_results.text: After creating the downstream propagation subtask, the skill re-fetches the task description and computes a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 163-185 (Task 2 Description Digest Comment Procedure): Step 1 re-fetches via 'jira.get_issue("TC-9002", fields=["description"])'; Step 3 computes digest via 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md'. The re-fetch and digest computation are explicitly documented for the downstream propagation task.

assertion_results.text: A digest comment with marker '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' is posted on each remediation task — both upstream and downstream (§1.66)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 99: 'jira.add_comment("TC-9001", "[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>")' for upstream. Line 184: 'jira.add_comment("TC-9002", "[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>")' for downstream. Both use the exact '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' marker. Additionally, digest comments are shown for all 4 tasks (TC-9001 through TC-9004) covering both streams.

assertion_results.text: Digest comments are posted BEFORE creating issue links (Depend, Blocks) or other comments on the tasks (§1.66, shared/description-digest-protocol.md Rules)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 97: 'Post the digest comment on TC-9001 BEFORE creating any links or other comments'. Line 186: same for TC-9002. The Order of Operations (lines 470-486) confirms: steps 2,4,6,8 post digest comments; steps 9-12 create all links afterward. Line 464: 'Only then create issue links (Depend, Blocks, Related) or other comments'.

assertion_results.text: The digest is computed using scripts/sha256-digest.py with the re-fetched description, not the description string passed to create_issue (shared/description-digest-protocol.md Hashing)
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 81-82 show re-fetching from Jira first ('upstream_desc = jira.get_issue("TC-9001", fields=["description"])') before computing digest. Lines 461-462 explicitly state: 'Re-fetch the created task's description from Jira (do NOT hash the description string passed to create_issue -- Jira normalizes content during storage)'. This matches the protocol requirement exactly.
